narrative.headline: SCRT2 execution accelerates to 59.5% completion while VegamDB achieves full milestone closure
narrative.overall_summary: SCRT2 demonstrates significant momentum with 59.5% average completion across 41 epics, though 76 remaining work items signal continued execution intensity. Salesforce Zero Data remains the critical path at 24.9% completion, while Managed SDB and SDB Query Proc teams drive balanced progress. VegamDB reaches 100% completion across all 3 epics, with one deployment epic under Watch status requiring monitoring despite technical completion.

weekly_status.headline: Executive Weekly Status
weekly_status.summary:
## Weekly update for SCRT2 and VegamDB on SDB for the week of 2026-04-20

### Executive Summary
- SCRT2 program maintains strong momentum with 20+ epics completed and key components progressing toward 4/30 milestone
- KV API foundation delivered with Query/Scan operations complete and Batch operations nearing completion
- CDC integration advancing with before/after image support and dynamic subscription capabilities
- Sharding and GSI components on track with catalog changes merged and runtime maintenance implemented
- VegamDB pilot facing deployment delays with pre-production cell builds still pending infrastructure provisioning

### Overview
- SCRT2 foundational work complete with focus shifting to advanced features including sharding integration and GSI support
- Multiple workstreams converging on 4/30 milestone with CDC, KV API, and Sharding components showing solid progress
- VegamDB deployment execution remains blocked on infrastructure provisioning despite completed development work
- Strong cross-team coordination evident across Managed SDB, Sayonara TxP, and SDB Query Processing teams

### Highlights by Workstream

#### SDB KV API
- **Goal**: Deliver complete KV API implementation with Query, Scan, and Batch operations for 4/30 milestone
- **Status**: On Track - Query and Scan operations completed, Batch operations code complete and ready for review
- **Progress**: Update Expression support completed for 4/30 scope, Tenant Operations (Create/Describe/List/Delete) delivered, BatchGet checked in with BatchWrite ready for review
- **Next**: Complete Batch operations review and integration, advance Sharding integration work for 5/30 milestone

#### SCRT2 on SDB
- **Goal**: Deliver CDC with before/after image support, GSI runtime maintenance, and Sharding integration
- **Status**: On Track - CDC core functionality progressing, GSI catalog changes completed, Sharding components advancing
- **Progress**: CDC before/after image merged to master with multi-session changes ready, GSI index maintenance at runtime complete, Sharding DDL and catalog changes in master
- **Next**: Complete CDC integration testing, advance GSI raw ingestion API design, continue Sharding LSM changes review process

#### VegamDB Pilot
- **Goal**: Complete deployment of pre-production cells for Data Cloud integration
- **Status**: Watch - Development work complete but deployment execution blocked
- **Progress**: KV API support delivered to CDP RT team, minimum idle hardware profile design completed
- **Next**: Resolve nodepool provisioning delays and SDB SC overrides to unblock pre-production cell builds

### Watch Item(s)
- VegamDB pre-production cell builds remain blocked on r7i.2xlarge nodepool provisioning and SDB SC overrides since 4/6
- Sharding LSM changes review pace may impact 5/30 milestone delivery with 4 critical changes pending review
- CDC dynamic subscription requirements for mSDB-in-a-box integration adding complexity to 4/30 scope

SCRT2 milestones.narrative: Execution velocity strengthens across seven teams with notable progress in KV API (56.8% complete) and Sharding (56.6% complete) workstreams, though 44 sharding items remain the largest technical challenge. CDC integration advances from early-stage to 25.1% completion with Sayonara TxP's core functionality epic reaching 68% complete, while Global Secondary Index maintains steady progress at 48.9% with concurrent creation and planner changes driving remaining complexity. Salesforce Zero Data continues as the primary bottleneck with foundational KV API refactoring still requiring focused attention despite overall program acceleration.

milestones: VegamDB: M1.0 Function Integration complete (3/20 completion)

VegamDB milestones.narrative: All VegamDB epics achieve 100% technical completion with zero remaining work items, marking successful closure of both development and deployment workstreams. SDB LCM Foundation's pre-production cell builds maintain Watch status despite full completion, indicating ongoing monitoring requirements for deployment stability. The program transitions from active development to operational oversight, with deployment infrastructure fully established across Managed SDB and SDB Performance teams.
